name: Rivet Engine
tagline: Build and scale stateful workloads with long-lived processes
description:
Build and scale stateful workloads with long-lived processes

Docs: https://www.rivet.dev/docs?utm_source=coolify.io

_Template derived from coollabsio/coolify (coolify@e7dff30, Apache-2.0). Default credentials are generated per-app — check the compose environment values._
docker_compose:
services:
  rivet-engine:
    image: rivetdev/engine:2.2.0
    environment:
      - RIVET__FILE_SYSTEM__PATH=/data
      - RIVET__AUTH__ADMIN_TOKEN=YjE5OGM5NTA0ZWMxN2Q4ZThkNjY1MzAw
    volumes:
      - rivet-data:/data
    healthcheck:
      test:
        - CMD
        - curl
        - -f
        - http://127.0.0.1:6420/health
      interval: 2s
      timeout: 10s
      retries: 10
      start_period: 30s
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - 42105:6420
volumes:
  rivet-data: null
